articles.title: Remembering the 11 who lost their lives in Lapu-Lapu attack, one year ago
articles.description: Eleven people were killed in the April 26, 2025, attack on the Lapu-Lapu Day festival in East Vancouver, with dozens more injured. Adam Kai-Ji Lo has been charged with 11 counts of second-degree murder and 31 counts of attempted murder, but has yet to face trial. These were the 11 who were killed: J
